subcodes.first_line: O Lord! With my face pressed to the dust, I supplicate before Thy most exalted Kingdom that Thou wouldst forgive Thy handmaiden who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم انی اکب بوجهی علی الترباء متضرعا الی ملکوتک الاعلی ان تغفر لامتک التی
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for the departed
